DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS7-L3-10001300-MSELA7-MEC-IFN-02 • MS ELA Grade 7 • Tracing and Evaluating Arguments

The Label Says More

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a boy and a girl about a museum exhibit they are working on. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students doing?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the girl say the label does not fit the display?
3QUESTION 3: What will the boy probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
